name: Brackelib.Stacks

documentation.description:
@summary
Implementation of the stack abstract data type
Removes all items from the stack.
Returns whether the stack is empty.
documentation.returns: True If the stack is empty

subprograms.name: Pop
subprograms.code: function Pop (Self : in out Stack) return T

documentation.description: Removes the top item off the stack and returns it.
documentation.returns: Item The top item is returned

exceptions.name: Stack_Empty
exceptions.description: Raised if the stack is empty and thus no item can be returned.

subprograms.name: Push
subprograms.code: procedure Push (Self : in out Stack; Item : T)

documentation.description: Adds an item to the top of the stack making it the top item.
Returns the number of items in the stack.
documentation.returns: Count Number of items in the stack

subprograms.name: Top
subprograms.code: function Top (Self : in Stack) return T

documentation.description: Returns the top item without removing it from the stack.
documentation.returns: Item The top item is returned

exceptions.name: Stack_Empty
exceptions.description: Raised if the stack is empty and thus no item can be returned.
